Blast off into Cosmic Dash, a charming pixel-art endless runner that sends you racing through the far reaches of space! Weave your little ship through a hail of asteroids, dodge the pull of hungry black holes, and dive into glowing portals to warp across the galaxy. Scoop up coins, tasty space snacks, and dazzling power-ups to push your run further and climb the high-score charts. With crisp retro visuals, snappy one-touch controls, and endlessly escalating cosmic chaos, every dash is a fresh challenge that's easy to pick up but hard to master. Best of all — no ads, no pop-ups, no annoying stuff. Just you, the stars, and the next big run. How far can you dash?
